Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.spigot.schematic.prop

Interface SpigotPropHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
AgeableAgeProp, AnaloguePowerablePowerProp, AttachableAttachedProp, BambooProp, BedPartProp, BeeHiveHoneyLevelProp, BellAttachmentProp, BigDripleafTiltProp, BisectedHalfProp, BrewingStandBottlesProp, BubbleColumnProp, CakeBitesProp, CampfireSignalFireProp, CandleProp, CaveVinesPlantBerriesProp, ChestTypeProp, CommandBlockConditionalProp, ComparatorModeProp, DayLightDetectorInvertedProp, DirectionalFaceProp, DispenserTriggeredProp, DoorHingeProp, EndPortalFrameEyeProp, FaceAttachableAttachedFaceProp, FarmLandMoistureProp, GateInWallProp, HangableHangingProp, HopperEnabledProp, JigsawOrientationProp, LeavesDistanceProp, LeavesPersistentProp, LevelledLevelProp, LightableLitProp, MultipleFacingFacesProp, NoteBlockInstrumentProp, NoteBlockNoteProp, OpenableOpenProp, OrientableAxisProp, PistonExtendedProp, PistonHeadIsShortProp, PointedDripstoneThicknessProp, PointedDripstoneVerticalDirectionProp, PowerablePoweredProp, RailShapeProp, RedstoneWireConnectionsProp, RepeaterDelayProp, RepeaterLockedProp, RespawnAnchorChargesProp, RotatableRotationProp, SaplingStageProp, ScaffoldingBottomProp, ScaffoldingDistanceProp, SculkCatalystBloomProp, SculkSensorPhaseProp, SculkShriekerCanSummonProp, SculkShriekerShrinkingProp, SeaPicklePicklesProp, SlabTypeProp, SnowableSnowyProp, SnowLayersProp, StairsProp, StructureBlockModeProp, TechnicalPistonTypeProp, TNTUnstableProp, TripwireDisarmedProp, TurtleEggEggsProp, TurtleEggHatchProp, WallHeightsProp, WallUpProp, WaterloggedProp
@AvailableSince("0.0.46") public interface SpigotPropHandler
Handler interface for updating properties of BlockData instances in Spigot.

Implementations of this interface are responsible for modifying the state or properties of a given BlockData object according to custom logic. This is typically used in schematic processing or block manipulation scenarios where block properties need to be dynamically updated.

Since:
0.0.46
See Also:
  • BlockProp

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    update(org.bukkit.block.data.BlockData blockData)
    Updates the given BlockData instance with custom property changes.

  • Method Details

    • update

      void update(org.bukkit.block.data.BlockData blockData)
      Updates the given BlockData instance with custom property changes.

      Implementations should modify the provided blockData as needed.

      Parameters:
      blockData - the BlockData to update
